45.reason: [Loop includes the newly added word itself (index 'num' before increment), leading to comparing uninitialized or self-data. Should loop only over existing words (i < num - 1).]

47.reason: [wc[num] is out-of-bounds because valid indices are 0 to num-1; after num++ above, wc[num] is beyond current valid data.]

56.reason: [Again, wc[num] is out-of-bounds; should assign to wc[num-1] after increment, or better: process before incrementing num.]
